reviews.review_title: i tested my paypal account with 0.99 eur
reviews.review_description:
Hoi yes this need a review i had a account problem i could not pay so i lookup up a low cost game and found this one yes it works so paypal is fine
But now the review of the game i want to do
its simple but fun if you have a little kid how want to to some VR experience this is great
you are in the dessert to defence you  from a invasion and has to kill them
simple and fast so please try it out for this price its a must and simple
but ok only one remark for the develops i'm left handed so not practical 
make it possible to change it or in the beginning ask it or pick up the gun left handed than is more nature for me left hand shooter
thanks keep going

developer_response.body:
Happy that this Paypal test leads you to our game :)
Thank you for your review!

reviews.review_description:
First, thank you developers for this good looking game, I enjoyed it , 
more level please , more and longer gameplay please if possible.  
 Need to different game modes and more weapons more powerful upgrades of guns if possible, please.  Thank you

developer_response.body: Great insight bryanlo! Let us work on some ideas for the next version!
